message:
feat(io): add Arrow IPC (Feather v2) read/write support

Add write_feather_bytes() and read_feather_bytes() implementing
pd.to_feather() and pd.read_feather() via Arrow IPC file format.
Enable the "ipc" feature on the arrow workspace dependency. Add
Arrow variant to IoError for IPC-specific error handling.

Includes RecordBatch-to-DataFrame conversion with automatic index
reconstruction and column ordering preservation across roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
